content:
Gerry Conway, a renowned comic book writer who helped create characters and stories for Marvel and DC, including the Punisher character in the Spider-Man comics, has died. He was 73.

In a Monday statement announcing his death, Marvel described Conway as a legendary comic book writer with a prolific career. He died of pancreatic cancer on Sunday in Thousand Oaks, California, his wife, Laura Conway, told The Associated Press.

Read more:
https://tmt.news/2334149

content:
i don’t know if this one is really any better, but my friend suggested changing the layout to something more like this

![An orange themed image discussing the “No Meta May Challenge”. It reads,

“ Tired of corporate spyware and feeds littered with ads? Ready for something better and more exciting??? Then it sounds like you may be ready to join the No Meta May Challenge!

Week One: 🚫 Threads, ✅ Wafrn May 1st - May 8th

• interact with posts from other Fediverse sites like Mastodon, Misskey, and more! • can interact with posts from Bluesky (optional!) • charming, janky, CSS crimes • will run doom if you ask it

Week Two : 🚫 WhatsApp and Facebook Messenger, ✅ Signal May 9th - May 16th

• messages actually between you and whoever you’re messaging, rather than between you, whoever you’re messaging, and zucc

Week Three: 🚫 Instagram, ✅ Pixelfed and Loops May 17th - May 23rd

• layouts of both sites are familiar • apps already available

Week Four (FINAL BOSS): 🚫Facebook, ✅ Fedibook May 24th - May 30th

• still relatively new, but just in time for #NoMetaMay • familiar layout compared to friendica • option to import your Facebook posts

May 31st: Congratulations! You’re finally Meta-free!!!

Invite your friends! Use #NoMetaMay and #NoMetaMayChallenge and let people know you’ve taken the challenge!“](https://media.piefed.social/posts/X4/dm/X4dmOIQuQMPFhdj.png)
